data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for tracking bookings by source.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of tracking bookings by source (Instagram vs Facebook vs website). However, the evidence provided does not include any concrete API reads or persisted state checks that confirm this functionality is implemented. While the linked use case mentions the need for tracking bookings by source, there is no direct evidence showing that this requirement is satisfied, leading to an inconclusive validation.
gaps: No evidence confirming the implementation of tracking bookings by source.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the tracking of bookings by source.
